studyName: Epigenetic Profiling of Human Colorectal Cancer

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: BRAF_mutation_type
variables.description: Somatic mutation in TP53 (Entrez GeneID: 673)?

variables.name: Clinical M
variables.description: Indicates the metastatic stage.

variables.name: Extracapsular Nodal Extension
variables.description: Indicates whether extracapsular nodal extension is documented.

variables.name: Extramural Blood Vessel Invasion
variables.description: Indicates the presence of extramural blood vessel invasion

variables.name: Grade/Diff
variables.description: Indicates the level/grade of differentiation

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: KRAS_mutation_type
variables.description: Somatic mutation in KRAS (Entrez GeneID: 3845)?

variables.name: Lymphatic Invasion
variables.description: Indicates whether lymphatic invasion is documented within the tumour.

variables.name: Pathological N
variables.description: Indicates the extent of nodal involvement determined pathologically at the time of diagnosis and prior to any treatment.

variables.name: Pathological T
variables.description: Indicates the primary tumour stage determined pathologically at the time of diagnosis and prior to any treatment.

variables.name: Perforation
variables.description: Indicates whether the bowel was perforated. Refers to clinical and pathological documented perforation.

variables.name: Perineal Invasion
variables.description: Indicates the presence of perineal invasion.

variables.name: Perineural Invasion
variables.description: Indicates whether perineural invasion is documented within the tumour.

variables.name: Peritoneal Seeding
variables.description: Indicates whether peritoneal seeding has been documented

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: Synchronous Primary Tumours
variables.description: Indicates whether more than one tumour is present.

variables.name: TP53_mutation
variables.description: Somatic mutation in TP53 (Entrez GeneID: 7157)?

variables.name: Tumour Size (cm)
variables.description: Indicates the greatest dimension of the largest tumour in centimetres (cm)

variables.name: Type of Procedure
variables.description: Describes the type of procedure performed to collect pathology sample.

variables.name: Vascular Invasion
variables.description: Indicates whether vascular invasion is documented within the tumour.

variables.name: sample_type
variables.description: How tissue sample was collected

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Site of Primary (Event)
variables.description: Indicates the site of primary for the patient's cancer.

variables.name: Site(s) of Disease
variables.description: This field describes all sites of disease present at the beginning of this diagnosis (event).

variables.name: Treatment Status
variables.description: Whether treatment was administered

variables.name: age
variables.description: Age at the time the speciment was taken

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJ_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. CNV_Array: CNV genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; DNA_Methylation: Genome-wide DNA methylation profile using methylation arrays, quantitative methylation measurements at the single-CpG-site level; WGS_SRA: Whole genome sequencing data available through SRA

variables.name: SAMP_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: GEO_ACCESSION
variables.description: GEO accession ID

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID
